text:
Sunset.
If not wonder, what can we do about such accurate clear
predictions which makes verification of the validity of

770, ____________________~ se~c~~~~~of~B~i~rt~h~T~im~e~R~e~c~tillfic~a~tz~·on
astrology possible! I request all to apply and verify the
accuracy of this truly verifiable hypothesis put forward by
many Rishi horas, and well clarified by Bhattolpala with his
example. If proved, only such methods can bring back the
lost glory of astrology back to its original status.
